notes: Ethena's USDe is delta-neutral: long spot + short perp on Binance/Bybit/Deribit via off-exchange custody (Copper, Ceffu). USDe and sUSDe are heavily wrapped — Pendle PT-USDe / PT-sUSDe markets, Aave + Morpho list as collateral, Curve / Uniswap host primary liquidity. De-peg risk cascades broadly.
